man.name: Man
man.examine: A citizen of the vale. Wants, on average, one quiet decade.

goblin.name: Goblin
goblin.examine: A war-chant that grew legs and kept marching.

chicken.name: Chicken
chicken.examine: Definitely a chicken. The farm predates the castle, and the chickens know it.

cow.name: Cow
cow.examine: Converts grass into beef. The most in-tune creature in the vale.

giant_rat.name: Giant rat
giant_rat.examine: Grown fat on grain stores and discord-mote runoff. Wants your lunch, structurally.

shopkeeper.name: Shop keeper
shopkeeper.examine: Third generation behind that counter. Remembers every adventurer's first purchase.

banker.name: Banker
banker.examine: A sworn Vaultwright. Your goods sit in a tuned vault, identical everywhere.

sheep.name: Sheep
sheep.examine: A walking jumper that hasn't been knitted yet.

tanner.name: Tanner
tanner.examine: Turns cowhides into leather, for a modest fee.

slayer_master.name: Brogan
slayer_master.examine: A gruff slayer master with a list of grudges.

magic_tutor.name: Mira the Magic Tutor
magic_tutor.examine: Her sleeves smell faintly of ozone.

gardener.name: Old Fen
gardener.examine: Knows every weed in the realm by first name.

cook.name: Cook Edda
cook.examine: Runs the castle kitchen with an iron ladle.

carpenter.name: Carpenter Lenny
carpenter.examine: Measures twice, saws once, sweeps never.

goblin_warlord.name: Goblin warlord
goblin_warlord.examine: The biggest, meanest goblin in the fort. The banner is load-bearing.

bog_horror.name: Bog horror
bog_horror.examine: A heap of swamp that decided to hold grudges.

shadow_drake.name: Shadow drake
shadow_drake.examine: A cave-dwelling drake the colour of a bad night.

city_guard.name: City guard
city_guard.examine: Keeps the peace in Aldgate, mostly by leaning on things.

ge_clerk.name: Exchange clerk
ge_clerk.examine: Buys low, sells high, blinks rarely.

innkeeper.name: Innkeeper
innkeeper.examine: Polishes the same tankard all day. It gleams.

ice_troll.name: Ice troll
ice_troll.examine: A boulder with opinions and frostbite.

ice_wolf.name: Ice wolf
ice_wolf.examine: A wolf the colour of a hard winter.

scorpion.name: Scorpion
scorpion.examine: All armour, attitude, and arithmetic of stings.

desert_bandit.name: Desert bandit
desert_bandit.examine: Travels light: a blade, a grin, and your purse.

magma_crawler.name: Magma crawler
magma_crawler.examine: A many-legged ember that never learned to cool down.

ash_fiend.name: Ash fiend
ash_fiend.examine: A scorched silhouette with a temper to match its habitat.

ice_queen.name: Maraza the Rimebound
ice_queen.examine: A queen frozen mid-fury, several centuries ago. Still furious.

bandit_king.name: Saif the Red Smile
bandit_king.examine: King of the dunes by vote. He counted the votes himself.

magma_fiend.name: Korr the Molten
magma_fiend.examine: The deep speaks in fire, and Korr is its loudest word.

fishmonger.name: Fishmonger Pell
fishmonger.examine: Smells of the sea and sound business sense.

harbormaster.name: Harbormaster Quill
harbormaster.examine: Keeps the tide schedule in her head and the docks in line.

mountain_guide.name: Guide Torvald
mountain_guide.examine: Has fallen off every ledge on the mountain, once each.

desert_nomad.name: Nomad Zahra
desert_nomad.examine: Sells what the desert forgot you would need.

gem_trader.name: Gem trader
gem_trader.examine: Eyes like a jeweller's loupe and prices to match.

bear.name: Bear
bear.examine: A great brown bear. It was here first, and it knows it.

dire_wolf.name: Dire wolf
dire_wolf.examine: A wolf grown too big for its forest, and too hungry for yours.

forest_spider.name: Forest spider
forest_spider.examine: A spider the size of a wheelbarrow, with none of the charm.

ruin_wraith.name: Ruin wraith
ruin_wraith.examine: A cold shape that remembers the ruins when they had roofs.

pirate.name: Pirate
pirate.examine: A wrecker of Gullswreck Cove. Everything he owns belonged to someone else.

pirate_captain.name: Captain Saltjaw
pirate_captain.examine: Master of the cove's wreckers. His grin has more gold than teeth.

cinder_imp.name: Cinder imp
cinder_imp.examine: A pocket-sized arsonist with a giggle like cracking embers.

village_elder.name: Elder Maeryn
village_elder.examine: Eldermere's memory, conscience, and final word on everything.

boatman.name: Boatman Wick
boatman.examine: Rows anywhere for a fair price and a dry story.

trapper.name: Trapper Hode
trapper.examine: Smells of woodsmoke and pelts. Counts furs the way bankers count coins.

wayfarer.name: Wayfarer Sorrel
wayfarer.examine: A travelling merchant whose pack holds a little of everywhere.

armourer.name: Hetta the Armourer
armourer.examine: Arms folded, like everything she sells.

grocer.name: Pim the Grocer
grocer.examine: Smells faintly of fresh bread and ambition.

gun_trainer.name: Sergeant Vex
gun_trainer.examine: Former city watch. Teaches the Gun skill to anyone who can keep both eyes open.

gun_guild_master.name: Master Flint
gun_guild_master.examine: Head of the Aldgate Gun Guild. His coat has more pockets than sense.

casino_dealer.name: Dealer Pip
casino_dealer.examine: Runs the House of Mild Regret with a smile sharp enough to cut cards.

danquavious_chimperton.name: Danquavious Chimperton III
danquavious_chimperton.examine: Sovereign of Bananas. The Third. Do not ask about the First or Second.

dentist_dr_tick.name: Dr. Ticksworth
dentist_dr_tick.examine: Dentist, tick wrangler, and reluctant taste-tester supervisor.

lady_ravenmoor.name: Lady Eseld Ravenmoor
lady_ravenmoor.examine: The last of the Ravenmoor line. The manor keeps her secrets; she keeps its.

groundskeeper.name: Groundskeeper Mortlock
groundskeeper.examine: He tends the hedges, the fountain, and one door he never opens.

imber_wizard.name: Calder Brightverse
imber_wizard.examine: A songcaster of Imber's line. His sleeves are scorched in a pattern he insists is notation.

quiess_wizard.name: Vesper Hollowell
quiess_wizard.examine: A pale songcaster who hums for the dead. Sometimes, faintly, something hums back.

tick_eater_glen.name: Glen the Tick Eater
tick_eater_glen.examine: The Dentist Tick Eat update's most dedicated patron.

discord_mote.name: Discord mote
discord_mote.examine: A wisp of the wrong colour humming a sixteenth of a note. Alone it is nothing. They are never alone.

untuned_golem.name: Untuned golem
untuned_golem.examine: Ore that stood up mid-smelt. Its seams glow where Aulden's bass line went wrong.

seam_creeper.name: Seam creeper
seam_creeper.examine: It lives in the skipped beat between two pick-strikes. By the time you hear it, it has already lunged.

foreman_echo.name: Foreman Echo
foreman_echo.examine: Wat Hollis's last shift, looping. It still knocks twice — then it skips ahead of the beat.

crystal_heart.name: The Crystal Heart
crystal_heart.examine: Every sliver in the vale rings in sympathy with this. It is not a vein. It is a tuning fork the size of a house.

cantor_surveyor.name: Cantor-Surveyor Brigh
cantor_surveyor.examine: Duchy surveyor seconded to the sealed wing. She logs every wrong note and pays for the evidence.

miller.name: Miller Hob Greaves
miller.examine: A miller whose mill owes him money. He has the paperwork to prove it.

discord_wisp.name: Discord Wisp
discord_wisp.examine: A sliver shaken loose and gone drifting. It hums a tune nobody started and nothing should finish.

hollow_miner.name: Hollow Miner
hollow_miner.examine: One of the '88 crew, peeled off the rock like ash. It still knocks twice before it swings.

the_dissonant.name: The Dissonant
the_dissonant.examine: A copyist-construct of slate and stretched wire. Its corrections are final.

manor_revenant.name: Manor Revenant
manor_revenant.examine: The shape of a lord, worn by a note that never resolves. It still keeps its hour.

chapel_echo.name: Chapel Echo
chapel_echo.examine: What remains of a Discord Wars chaplain: one held note, shaped like patience.

light_keeper.name: Keeper Brand Wicklow
light_keeper.examine: Keeper of Gullswreck Light. Married to the job; the job is winning.

cove_fence.name: Tilly Two-Receipts
cove_fence.examine: Sells everything twice and the truth at a premium.

market_clerk.name: Market clerk
market_clerk.examine: Concord of Weights desk staff. Owns a stool, a quill, and the great board's chalk — the chalk is audited.
